text:
display_lesson:
    addi sp, sp, -64
    sw ra, 60(sp)
    sw fp, 56(sp)
    addi fp, sp, 64
    sw a0, -4(fp)
    sw a1, -8(fp)
    lw t0, -8(fp)
    li t1, 0
    sub t0, t0, t1
    seqz t0, t0
    beqz t0, else1
    li a0, 0
    j display_lesson_end0
    j endif2

else1:
    li a0, 0
    lw t0, -8(fp)
    addi sp, sp, -4
    sw t0, 0(sp)
    li t1, 1
    lw t0, 0(sp)
    addi sp, sp, 4
    sub a1, t0, t1
    call display_lesson
    j display_lesson_end0
endif2:

display_lesson_end0:
    lw ra, 60(sp)
    lw fp, 56(sp)
    addi sp, sp, 64
    ret
    
    li t0, 0
    sw t0, -4(fp)
    lw a0, -4(fp)
    li a1, 1
    call display_lesson
    mv t0, a0
    sw t0, -12(fp)
    lw a1, -12(fp)
    li a0, 1
    ecall
# Exit program
li a0, 10
ecall
